title: Snowbound Serenity
description: Snowbound Serenity is a cozy winter/christmas themed modpack that turns Minecraft into a calm, snow-covered world filled with peaceful exploration and serene seasonal beauty.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/haRLyM9wmIY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bedb1ee78d445d0c5e2ecc8080ed21515b661e5.png)

# FEATURES

✓ Lightweight Vanilla+ experience

✓ A small selection of QoL mods for smoother gameplay

✓ FancyMenu layout for a nicer UI

✓ Minimal performance tweaks

✓ Keeps the game close to classic Minecraft

✓ Perfect for small friend groups and chill servers

✓ No unnecessary bloat, only stuff that actually matter


# WHAT’S INCLUDED
## ✔ Quality of Life Improvements

Faster, smoother gameplay

Clean UI and organized menus

Small tweaks that improve the experience without changing vanilla

## ✔ Visual Polish

Refined FancyMenu configuration

Subtle interface improvements

Compatible with shaders if players want them

## ✔ Multiplayer-Friendly

Designed for small servers and friend groups

Stable, simple, and reliable

No massive worldgen mods or heavy features that slow things down

# ABOUT THIS PACK

A simple, polished modpack originally built for me and my friends.
The goal: keep Minecraft feeling like Minecraft, while adding just enough quality-of-life mods and small improvements to make the game smoother, cleaner, and more enjoyable.

Lightweight, friendly, and easy to run, perfect for casual play or chill SMPs.
